title: Eligible patient's access to individualized investigational drugs, biological products, or devices
doc_html:
§1300.77. Eligible patient's access to individualized investigational drugs, biological products, or devices

            A. An official, employee, or agent of this state shall not block or attempt to block an eligible patient's access to an individualized investigational drug, biological product, or device.

            B. Providing counseling, advice, or a recommendation consistent with medical standards of care from a licensed healthcare provider shall not be a violation of this Section.

            Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
doc_text:
§1300.77.  Eligible patient's access to individualized investigational drugs, biological
products, or devices
A.  An official, employee, or agent of this state shall not block or attempt to block an
eligible patient's access to an individualized investigational drug, biological product, or
device.
B.  Providing counseling, advice, or a recommendation consistent with medical
standards of care from a licensed healthcare provider shall not be a violation of this Section.
Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
